AreaTrend.description: Trend data for a research area over time.

years.description: List of years in chronological order, e.g. [2017, 2018, ..., 2026].
years.title: Years

participation_pct.description: AE participation rate per year (%), parallel to the years list.
participation_pct.title: Participation Pct

available_pct.description: Available badge rate per year (%), parallel to the years list.
available_pct.title: Available Pct

functional_pct.description: Functional badge rate per year (%), parallel to the years list.
functional_pct.title: Functional Pct

reproduced_pct.description: Reproduced badge rate per year (%), parallel to the years list.
reproduced_pct.title: Reproduced Pct

AreaTrend.title: AreaTrend

ConferenceYearStats.description: Participation stats for a single conference-year.

venue_type.description: Venue type: 'conference' for main conferences, 'workshop' for co-located workshops.
venue_type.title: Venue Type

total_papers.description: Total accepted papers in this conference-year (including those without artifacts).
total_papers.title: Total Papers

ae_papers.description: Number of papers that participated in the artifact evaluation process.
ae_papers.title: Ae Papers

available.description: Number of papers that received the 'available' badge.
available.title: Available

functional.description: Number of papers that received the 'functional' badge.
functional.title: Functional

reproduced.description: Number of papers that received the 'reproduced' badge.
reproduced.title: Reproduced

available_pct.description: Percentage of total papers with 'available' badge: (available / total_papers) * 100.
available_pct.title: Available Pct

functional_pct.description: Percentage of total papers with 'functional' badge: (functional / total_papers) * 100.
functional_pct.title: Functional Pct

reproduced_pct.description: Percentage of total papers with 'reproduced' badge: (reproduced / total_papers) * 100.
reproduced_pct.title: Reproduced Pct

ConferenceYearStats.title: ConferenceYearStats

description: Artifact evaluation participation rates per conference-year, with area-level trends over time.

by_conference_year.description: Per-conference-year breakdown with paper counts and badge statistics.
by_conference_year.title: By Conference Year

by_area.description: Trend data keyed by area: 'security' and 'systems'. Each has parallel year/rate arrays.
by_area.title: By Area

title: ParticipationStats
